message:
fix(security): enforce host_pattern matching, hot-elevation policy gate, and adversary prior calibration

intent_firewall: TrafficPolicyRule.host_pattern was declared but never
evaluated during rule matching. Wire up matches_host() with exact and
wildcard (*.domain) support so host-scoped rules take effect.

isolation_rail_router: ElevationPolicy.allow_hot_elevation was never
checked in hot_elevate(). Add HotElevationDisabled error variant and
enforce the policy gate before permitting runtime rail elevation.

adversary_graph: Default Bayesian prior was alpha=1/beta=1 (uniform,
50% adversary probability) which is unreasonably aggressive. Change to
alpha=1/beta=9 (~10% prior) so new nodes start skeptical rather than
hostile. Extract named constants for the prior parameters.

All three share the pattern: policy fields existed on structs but were
silently ignored at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
